question: Based on the chart, what can be concluded about revenue when advertising spend reaches 200 thousands?

options.A: Revenue will likely be around 200 thousands
options.B: Cannot be determined due to data variability.
options.C: Revenue will definitely be less than 100 thousands
options.D: The trend suggests revenue will continue to decline, so it will be lower than at 150 thousands

explanation: While the trend line suggests decreasing revenue, the data shows significant variability and only goes up to 150 thousands. Extrapolating to 200 thousands involves uncertainty, and option C implies a level of certainty that cannot be guaranteed given the scatter in the data. The concealed uncertainty lies in the variability around the trend line and the act of extrapolation beyond the observed data range.
